form.formComment: At debut, sat on the speed and boxed on steadily 6th of 8 at Pakenham 2yo Mdn-Sw on April 2 over 1200m, on a slow track; 4 len behind Profligate carrying 58kg at $7. Will improve and can get off the mark.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(2). At debut, sat on the speed and boxed on steadily 6th of 8 at Pakenham 2yo Mdn-Sw on April 2 over 1200m, on a slow track; 4 len behind Profligate carrying 58kg at $7. Will improve and can get off the mark.

form.formComment: Two-year-old colt making debut by Too Darn Hot out of Shosha. Won a jump-out at Sandown-Hillside on April 1. Trialled well and keep well onside.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Two-year-old colt making debut by Too Darn Hot out of Shosha. Won a jump-out at Sandown-Hillside on April 1. Trialled well and keep well onside.

form.formComment: Gelding by I Am Immortal making his first appearance. Won an Ararat jump-out on April 8. Breaks from a low barrier draw and the betting will tell.

form.formComment: Was at very long odds at debut, raced on the speed throughout before fading to run last of 11 at Ballarat 2yo Mdn-Sw on February 22 over 1100m, 14 len behind Medicinal with 58kg at $101. Has to improve.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Was at very long odds at debut, raced on the speed throughout before fading to run last of 11 at Ballarat 2yo Mdn-Sw on February 22 over 1100m, 14 len behind Medicinal with 58kg at $101. Has to improve.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced three wide without cover throughout.

form.formComment: Filly by Doubtland facing the starter for the first time. Ran 3rd in a Caulfield Heath trial over 800m on March 26. Big chance to make an immediate impact.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Filly by Doubtland facing the starter for the first time. Ran 3rd in a Caulfield Heath trial over 800m on March 26. Big chance to make an immediate impact.

form.formComment: First start. By leading sire I Am Invincible out of Luskintyre Lass. Purchased for AUD $ 420,000 (Magic Millions 2025 Gold Coast Yearling Sale). Ran 3rd in a Pakenham jump-out on March 17. Following that finished fourth in a Pakenham jump-out on March 24. In a top barn and keep very safe.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). First start. By leading sire I Am Invincible out of Luskintyre Lass. Purchased for AUD $ 420,000 (Magic Millions 2025 Gold Coast Yearling Sale). form.formComment: Was at long odds at debut, ran last of 8 at Cranbourne 2yo Mdn-Sw on March 27 over 1000m, on a slow track; 6 len behind Sunbliss carrying 56kg at $31. Can go better.
